steps.description: Hash-verify the source inventory, route decision packet, RED baseline, merge execution result, CI evidence, diff/scope evidence, and failed-local-attempt rollback artifact.
steps.output: source hash verification table inside the future readiness packet

steps.description: Check whether each required contract artifact exists without executing proof-loop commands or touching Project_ARIS.
Verify every present future artifact binds to IF09-FIND-001, accepted_merged_track_a, patch commit, and merge commit.
Emit pass only if all required future artifacts are present, hash-verified, non-contradictory, and free of closure/product/Bedrock claims.
steps.output: candidate readiness decision for a later non-PURG05 or PURG05 route decision as appropriate
